defaults.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.0 instruction floor; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.detail: Direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM PTX compilation rejected llvm.nvvm.elect.sync with 'Callsite was not defined with variable arguments' and NVVM_ERROR_COMPILATION. The 525-byte source had SHA-256 50c9d2f3d137bc6a626c3f26618fe2e27f4fbf5611793390f98d49ab8b365e68.

libNVVM produced 1,760-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 8ece269aaf4f669c1b16eb297b6fa7729de34d449cc17b9ca48149db87c28f7e, but CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink rejected it with the same broken-callsite error and produced no cubin.

stages.representation: convergent inline PTX materializing the predicate as i32 then truncating to i1
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM retained both exact inline elect.sync blocks with no extern calls. The 1,915-byte source had SHA-256 e59f441c92eaa1b3194fbfaa77a7f9614161dec2464feb7d3e9cf36f1c27b622; direct 515-byte PTX had SHA-256 eceb98cddfddfdf09a72710cd13462af745eb44eb8b15b5082e560a58a5845d5; 2,120-byte LTOIR had SHA-256 7a8dd8f0a26a975352370eb00246f79f9c111d59d8d9847efd785c3264e4a92b.

stages.representation: linked cubin from the reviewed inline-PTX LTOIR
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink produced a 3,560-byte cubin with SHA-256 fe782c618044a7c8e6777ad12d29b31e8e3c9ebdbb6c4eabf6319f3045b67397. Direct ptxas also accepted the retained PTX and produced a 3,560-byte cubin with SHA-256 dca3adbbd0f75cc7d15f3b10e94f621d47fb9d658d3a3ae623d1b1ee769be76e.
